{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Monarch factions
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Monarch factions]] are groups that do not move quickly.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Monarch factions]] can end up in a state of tyranny when they have no rivals.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
